Die identity and reset source status

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x308
Size:
0x4
Source:
syscrg_rf.rdl

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:24] - - - -
[23:16] die_num r 0x0 quantity of DIEs in package
[15:8] die_ordinal r 0x0 ordinal of this die
[7:0] chip_rstsrc_status r 0x0 chip reset source status

Field Descriptions

chip_rstsrc_status - chip reset source status

[0]=internal POR, [1]=ext die POR, [2]=key reset, [3]=WDT, [4]=SW reset, [5]=ext die reset from die0, [6]=u84 debug_ndreset, [7]=scpu debug_ndreset
